Matter discussed. The Court grants the motion for withdrawal of attorney of record.

Counsel is to prepare and submit a proposed order in the appropriate judicial council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
